allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const k=process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY; console.log\('present:', !!k, 'length:', k ? k.length : 0\)")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const k=process.env.GEMINI_API_KEY; console.log\('prefix:', k.slice\(0,6\)\); console.log\('has_quotes:', /[\\"']/.test\(k\)\); console.log\('has_whitespace:', /\\s/.test\(k\)\); console.log\('trimmed_len_diff:', k.length - k.trim\(\).length\)")
